'''kadhata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachflea|beachflea]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachflea|beachflea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kadhata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædhætæth|kædhætæth]] || [[word:kædhætæj|kædhætæj]] || [[word:kædhætæsh|kædhætæsh]] || [[word:kædhætæ|kædhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhadhatath|kadhadhatath]] || [[word:kadhadhataj|kadhadhataj]] || [[word:kadhadhatash|kadhadhatash]] || [[word:kadhadhata|kadhadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhatath|kadhatath]] || [[word:kadhataj|kadhataj]] || [[word:kadhatash|kadhatash]] || [[word:kadhata|kadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhaftath|kadhaftath]] || [[word:kadhaftaj|kadhaftaj]] || [[word:kadhaftash|kadhaftash]] || [[word:kadhaftaf|kadhaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhatatha|kadhatatha]] || [[word:kadhataja|kadhataja]] || [[word:kadhatasha|kadhatasha]] || [[word:kadhataka|kadhataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhatath|kadhatath]] || [[word:kadhataj|kadhataj]] || [[word:kadhatash|kadhatash]] || [[word:kadhata|kadhata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhatathal|kadhatathal]] || [[word:kadhatajal|kadhatajal]] || [[word:kadhatashal|kadhatashal]] || [[word:kadhatakal|kadhatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhatathatha|kadhatathatha]] || [[word:kadhatajaja|kadhatajaja]] || [[word:kadhatashasha|kadhatashasha]] || [[word:kadhataka|kadhataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhatathan|kadhatathan]] || [[word:kadhatajan|kadhatajan]] || [[word:kadhatashan|kadhatashan]] || [[word:kadhatakan|kadhatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhatathaoro|kadhatathaoro]] || [[word:kadhatajaoro|kadhatajaoro]] || [[word:kadhatashaoro|kadhatashaoro]] || [[word:kadhatakaoro|kadhatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
